updates.title: ITR filing AY 2026-27: Why salaried taxpayers should wait until 15 June before filing returns
updates.summary: The Income Tax Act, 2025, effective from April 1, 2026, renames Form 16 to Form 130. Salaried taxpayers should wait until June 15 to file ITR for AY 2026-27, as employers must provide Form 130 by this date for accurate filing.
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this taxation development

updates.title: SGB Tax Rule Changed: Why Exchange Buyers Lose Out
updates.summary: Budget 2026 changed SGB taxation. The original subscribers keep tax-free maturity gains, while exchange the buyers now pay 12.5 per cent LTCG tax.
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process

updates.title: 8th Pay Commission: 10 key FAQs on salary hike, pension and fitment factor for central government employees
updates.summary: The 8th Pay Commission, constituted on November 3, 2025, is reviewing salaries and pensions for central government employees and pensioners over its 18-month tenure. Its recommendations, expected by May 2027, will significantly impact financial benefits and livelihoods amidst rising inflation.

updates.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has an estimated net worth of ₹7 crore at 15: How does income tax work for minors?
updates.summary: Teen cricketer Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has a net worth of  ₹7 crore at 15, primarily from cricket earnings and endorsements. Tax laws for minors in India generally club their income with that of the parent, with exceptions for specific circumstances like income from personal skills. Details here.
